name: Vignette Corporation
description: Vignette Corporation was a prominent American software company headquartered in Austin, Texas, that specialized in enterprise content management, web portal, and collaboration software. The company provided a comprehensive suite of tools designed to help organizations manage, publish, and deliver digital content across various platforms. Vignette was a significant player in the web content management market before being acquired by OpenText Corporation in 2009. Following the acquisition, Vignette's technologies were integrated into OpenText's broader portfolio of enterprise information management solutions, continuing to support businesses in managing their digital assets and web presence.
